pt.title: WEB & SYSTEMS
pt.description: Arquitetura e desenvolvimento de sites, aplicações web e sistemas de alta performance. Design escalável com foco em estabilidade e segurança desde o código-fonte.

pt.title: DEFENSIVE SECURITY
pt.description: Arquitetura de segurança defensiva. Hardening de infraestrutura, implementação de Zero Trust, detecção autônoma e protocolos de defesa para servidores e endpoints.

pt.title: AUTOMATION & TOOLING
pt.description: Engenharia de ferramentas e automação. Scripts e pipelines personalizados (Python/PowerShell) para eliminar gargalos operacionais e orquestrar fluxos complexos.

pt.title: AI & DETECTION
pt.description: Integração de inteligência artificial para detecção de anomalias, análise comportamental e resposta automatizada a incidentes em tempo real.

pt.title: GOVERNANCE & COMPLIANCE
pt.description: Governança de segurança e conformidade regulatória. Frameworks LGPD/GDPR, políticas de acesso, auditoria contínua e gestão de riscos.

pt.title: PERFORMANCE ENGINEERING
pt.description: Otimização cirúrgica de performance. Tuning de sistemas, análise de bottlenecks e engenharia de recursos para máxima eficiência operacional.

en.title: WEB & SYSTEMS
en.description: Architecture and development of websites, web applications, and high-performance systems. Scalable design focused on stability and security from the source code up.

en.title: DEFENSIVE SECURITY
en.description: Defensive security architecture. Infrastructure hardening, Zero Trust implementation, autonomous detection, and defense protocols for servers and endpoints.

en.title: AUTOMATION & TOOLING
en.description: Tool engineering and automation. Custom scripts and pipelines (Python/PowerShell) to eliminate operational bottlenecks and orchestrate complex workflows.

en.title: AI & DETECTION
en.description: Artificial intelligence integration for anomaly detection, behavioral analysis, and automated real-time incident response.

en.title: GOVERNANCE & COMPLIANCE
en.description: Security governance and regulatory compliance. LGPD/GDPR frameworks, access policies, continuous auditing, and risk management.

en.title: PERFORMANCE ENGINEERING
en.description: Surgical performance optimization. System tuning, bottleneck analysis, and resource engineering for maximum operational efficiency.
